properties.name: BHARAT RATNA DR. APJ ABDUL KALAM LEARNING RESOURCE CENTRE
properties.description: One of the largest digital libraries in Asia, featuring over 150,000 volumes, high-speed computer terminals, reading sections, and seminar spaces.

properties.name: Student Activity Center (SAC) Building
properties.description: The primary hub for student extracurriculars, clubs, gymnasium, indoor court systems, music room, and the student senate headquarters.

properties.name: Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
properties.description: Hosts advanced VLSI design, communication, signal processing, and high-tech microwave instruction systems.

properties.name: NIT Silchar Health Centre
properties.description: The primary care medical clinic providing 24/7 emergency care, dispensary, observation beds, and campus ambulance support.

properties.name: Director's Residence
properties.description: The official residence bungalow of the Director of NIT Silchar, set in beautifully landscaped, calm gardens.

properties.name: Gymkhana Park, NIT Silchar
properties.description: A tranquil botanical parkland featuring stone benches, decorative foliage, and jogging tracks adjacent to the Learning Resource Centre.

properties.name: Central Computer Center, NIT Silchar
properties.description: Houses institutional high-speed servers, cluster supercomputing arrays, and major programming/examination labs.

properties.name: Department of Physics (New)
properties.description: Focuses on condensed matter, non-linear optics, and advanced physics research laboratories.

properties.name: CET Hall
properties.description: Center for Educational Technology seminar hall, hosting placement talks, student conventions, and executive keynotes.

properties.name: Electrical Engineering Department
properties.description: Houses smart grid testing cells, control systems simulation hubs, power electronics labs, and faculty rooms.

properties.name: Department of Civil Engineering, NIT Silchar
properties.description: State of the art geotech, concrete, structural, and environmental labs. Includes a comprehensive civil library.

properties.name: New Gallery
properties.description: State-of-the-art acoustic digital classroom galleries equipped with high-tech multimedia and smart podiums.

properties.name: C-DAC
properties.description: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing center hosting supercomputing workshops and government IT projects.

properties.name: Department of Mechanical Engineering, NIT Silchar
properties.description: Comprehensive workshops, thermal engines laboratories, fluid machines hall, and CAD design centers.

properties.name: NIT's Cafe
properties.description: Warm community cafe serving delicious hot rolls, wraps, freshly brewed espresso, and Assamese tea.

properties.name: SBI Branch NIT Silchar
properties.description: The primary on-campus financial hub assisting students with loans, fees, accounts, and 24/7 ATM booths.

properties.name: National Institute of Technology, Silchar Administrative Block
properties.description: The main administrative offices overseeing admission, finance, academic records, and the Registrar and Director chambers.

properties.name: Boys Hostel 1 (Aryabhatta Hall of Residence)
properties.description: The vibrant Aryabhatta residential hall for freshman students, featuring dual dining halls, and continuous Wi-Fi.

properties.name: Synthetic Tennis Court
properties.description: High-grade outdoor synthetic tennis court complete with floodlights and spectator benches.

properties.name: NIT Silchar Water Plant
properties.description: Central processing, filtration, chlorination and water distribution facility catering to the entire NIT campus.

properties.name: 9B (Srinivasa Ramanujan Hall)
properties.description: Hostel 9B residence hall offering high-speed fiber-net, recreation lounges, and beautiful lake vistas.

properties.name: 9C (CV Raman Hall)
properties.description: Hostel 9C residence complex, boasting modern architecture, high security, study halls, and dining facilities.

properties.name: 9D (Vikram Sarabhai Hall)
properties.description: Hostel 9D offering premium single rooms for senior scholars, doctoral candidates, and dynamic guest lecturers.

properties.name: Hostel 9C and 9D Unified Mess
properties.description: Modern common mess serving healthy, sanitary multi-cuisine food to Raman and Sarabhai hall scholars.

properties.name: Hostel 9A Hall of Residence
properties.description: Spacious hostel blocks housing sophomore student groups with robust security, mess, and badminton yard.

properties.name: Hostel Kiran (Boys Hostel 7)
properties.description: The legendary Hostel 7 (Kiran Hall), offering amazing lakeside views, sprawling garden lawns, and badminton courts.

properties.name: H7 Volleyball Court
properties.description: Dedicated floodlit volleyball playground for Hostel 7 sports enthusiasts.

properties.name: H6 Volleyball Court
properties.description: Outdoor court for local recreational tournaments and matches.

properties.name: Sipra Rani Roy Assamese Canteen
properties.description: Famous local Assamese dining canteen catering fresh fish, local dal, and high-quality fast snacks.

properties.name: Main Basketball Court Complex
properties.description: Two fully synthetic floodlit basketball courts with spectator stands and modern fiberglass boards.

properties.name: Football ground NIT SILCHAR
properties.description: The beautiful green main sports field used for football, cricket tournaments, sports festivals, and parades.

properties.name: NIT Silchar Main Athletic Running Track Stadium
properties.description: The 8-lane athletic standard track stadium (labeled Administrative Block on maps) featuring dynamic running, high jump, and seating gallery.

properties.name: Central Sports Complex
properties.description: Comprehensive multi-sport facility hosting dynamic indoor table tennis, squash, weightlifting, and sports administrative offices.

properties.name: Indie Lake (Eco Sanctuary)
properties.description: A gorgeous, massive freshwater lake featuring pristine natural surroundings, native lotus plants, and rare migratory birds.

properties.name: LP School
properties.description: Lower Primary school educating staff children and providing quality primary instruction.

properties.name: NIT Silchar Nursery
properties.description: Campus botanical nursery propagating beautiful seasonal flowers, shrubs, and trees to maintain the lush green biosphere of NIT Silchar.

properties.name: Children's Mini Park
properties.description: Lawn park equipped with modern play systems, sliders, multi-swings, and safe turfing for staff kids.

properties.name: Lake Viewpoint 3
properties.description: Lakeside observatory point built on wooden stilts, boasting spectacular clear views of the sprawling central water reservoirs.

properties.name: Lake Viewpoint 2
properties.description: Pleasant viewpoint on the southeastern campus lake, perfect for bird-watching and sunset sights.

properties.name: Cake and Bake Bakery
properties.description: Delicious campus-famous confectionery selling customizable cakes, croissants, hot puffs, and sweet treats.

properties.name: Arunangshu Staff Residence
properties.description: Quiet upscale staff quarters set in peaceful residential wooded lanes.

properties.name: MSH (A Lalitha Hall of Residence)
properties.description: A. Lalitha Married Scholars Hostel Wing, naming the pioneering Indian electrical engineer A. Lalitha.

properties.name: Married Scholar Hostel Complex
properties.description: Comfortable dynamic family residential blocks for married doctoral candidates and researchers.

properties.name: CV Raman Staff Quarters
properties.description: Exclusive duplex housing quarters designated for senior professors and visiting scientific experts.

properties.name: BH 5 Food Canteen
properties.description: Lively eatery situated near Hostel 5, famous for maggi, egg-rolls, coffee, and late night discussions.

properties.name: Hostel 5 (BH 5 Residence)
properties.description: Hostel 5 complex providing clean double-rooms for undergraduate sophomore students.

properties.name: Startup Centre, NIT Silchar
properties.description: The technology and business incubation workspace nurturing student-led innovations and product development.

properties.name: NIT Silchar Main Entrance Gate
properties.description: The primary secure gateway to NIT Silchar campus, styled with security checks and magnificent institutional arches.
